programs.title: The Mighty Quinn
programs.desc: When police officer Xavier Quinn (Denzel Washington) learns that his childhood friend has become the prime suspect in a murder case, he also discovers that he's the only one who feels that his friend was framed to protect the local tourism business.

programs.title: Out Of Time
programs.desc: Denzel Washington is caught in a web of intrigue as he investigates the murder of a woman he was seeing...and all the evidence points to him.

programs.title: Colors
programs.desc: As members of the Los Angeles Police Department's elite anti-gang unit, a seasoned cop (Robert Duvall) and his new partner (Sean Penn) are called in to assist with the crackdown against the mounting gang violence in the slums of East Los Angeles.

programs.title: At Close Range
programs.desc: A farm boy (Sean Penn) looking for excitement finds himself on a collision course with his smooth-talking gang leader father (Christopher Walken) in this "powerfully disturbing" (Newsweek) tale based on the story of real-life killer Bruce Johnston.

programs.title: Ronin
programs.desc: Robert De Niro, Jean Reno and Stellan Skarsgard headline a stellar cast in director John Frankenheimer's action-packed and intelligent spy thriller about a group of for-hire mercenaries out to steal a top-secret briefcase for a mysterious client.

programs.title: Running Scared
programs.desc: Billy Crystal and Gregory Hines have winning chemistry as two of the Windy City's finest (and wildest) cops, out to nail Chicago's toughest criminal in this comedy thriller that asks the question, "How come the bad guys always drive the good cars?"
